name: Argus
intro: Argus, the Dark Angel, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Warmonger
abilities.description: Buff Mobility When Argus' blade reaches 100 Malice Energy [ amount unknown ] . He will launch a Demonic Slash with his next Basic Attack, dealing 80 (+50% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and recovering 100 (+10% Total Physical Attack) HP . This attack ignores 30% of the target's Physical Defense Argus' Demonic Blade gains 5 Malice Energy per second, and each of his Basic Attacks grants 25 Malice Energy. ( critical strikes grant an additional 25 energy) The Energy cap is 200. Each Demonic Slash consumes 100 Energy. Skill terms Physical Basic Attack Deal Physical Damage to enemies. Triggers ATK Effects and Lifesteal. Charge Movement ability that cannot pass through obstacles.

abilities.name: Demonic Grip
abilities.description: Mobility Debuff Argus streches out a demonic hand in the target direction, dealing 125–250 (+60% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to the first enemy hero or creep hit, stunning them for 0.7 seconds and pulling him and the target towards the other, then the target is slowed by 40% for 2s. If no enemy is hit, Argus pulls himself toward the hand's destination instead. Use Again: Argus dashes and strikes in the target direction, dealing 175–300 (+100% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies along the path. Skill terms Stunned A state that prevents a target from moving, attacking, or using skills. Blink Movement ability that can pass through obstacles. Physical Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.

abilities.name: Meteoric Sword
abilities.description: Damage Buff After a short delay, Argus thrusts his Demonic Blade in the target direction, dealing 60–180 (+100% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies hit. The charge time decreases as Attack Speed increases. Argus Fighter If an enemy hero is hit, he immediately gains 100 Malice Energy and becomes enhanced for 3s. While enhanced, he gains 30-55% Attack Speed, and Demonic Slash restores 50 Malice Energy. Meteoric Sword counts as a Basic Attack, can trigger Attack Effects, and can Crit. Skill terms Basic Attack

abilities.name: Eternal Evil
abilities.description: Death Immune Buff Battlefield is my playground and I think nothing of life and death. Argus draws his Meteoric Sword and removes all debuffs (excluding Suppression ) on himself, dealing 150–300 (+50% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and gaining Death Immunity for 4s. When the state ends, he converts all damage dealt to heroes during this duration into HP. Passive: If Argus takes fatal damage while Eternal Evil is not on cooldown, Eternal Evil triggers automatically but only grants Death Immunity for 3s. Skill terms Physical Damage Physical Damage taken can be reduced by increasing Physical Defense.
